requirementAdaptation.justification: Priority router file created. Priority router file exists but no routing logic (switch/if on priority) found in diff. Priority-to-channel mapping 'urgent->SMS' found. Priority-to-channel mapping 'normal->email' found. Priority-to-channel mapping 'low->webhook' found. Notification service updated to use priority router.

decisionEvolution.justification: Session 3 did not use coordination tools to reconsider prior decisions. Session 4 discovered priority routing in its early tool calls.

backwardCompatibility.justification: No backward-compatibility issues detected in channel files.

integrationCompleteness.justification: Score 100/100. Audit service file created. Audit service contains logging/recording logic. Preferences service file created. Preferences service contains per-user preference logic. Integration test file(s) found. Integration tests contain assertions. Integration tests reference notification flow components.
